title: Knowledge base: cable reel minimum order quantity
notes: KB-DRIVEN QUANTITY POLICY. The 'Polityki sprzedaży' space sets a 5-reel MOQ for cables on reels; the customer orders 2. The full-knowledge answer is KAB-YDYP-3X25 x5 with the policy cited. Likely a GAP today: agents tend to keep the requested quantity, so this scores 0.5 on the item (right SKU, wrong qty) and the rounding lands in a note at best — a roadmap metric for applying commercial rules. Gauge is explicit in the request, so this isolates the MOQ behavior.

customer.name: ElektroHurt Lublin Sp. z o.o.
customer.profile: Regional wholesaler reselling to small installers.
